title: Classifiers: Extended
description: More classifiers for books, pictures, pairs, and everyday objects
intro: Beyond the basics (cái, con, ly), Vietnamese has specific classifiers for books, pictures, vehicles, pairs, and more. These make your speech sound natural and precise.

questions.prompt: What classifier is used for books? 'một ___ sách'
questions.explanation: 'cuốn' is for bound items — books, notebooks: cuốn sách, cuốn vở

questions.prompt: What classifier is used for pictures/paintings? 'một ___ tranh'
questions.explanation: 'bức' is for flat art — paintings, photos, letters: bức tranh, bức ảnh, bức thư
'đôi' = pair. For things that come in twos: đôi giày, đôi đũa (chopsticks)

questions.prompt: 'Chiếc' is used for what kind of objects?
questions.correct: Single items from a pair, or vehicles
options: Single items from a pair, or vehicles
questions.explanation: 'chiếc' = one of a pair (chiếc giày = one shoe), or vehicles (chiếc xe)
'chiếc' for vehicles: chiếc xe máy, chiếc ô tô, chiếc xe đạp

questions.prompt: What classifier is used for flat sheets? 'một ___ giấy (paper)'
questions.explanation: 'tờ' is for flat sheets — paper, newspaper, banknotes: tờ giấy, tờ báo, tờ tiền
'quả' (North) or 'trái' (South) for round fruits: quả cam, quả táo. Note: 'quả' is both the classifier and the word!

questions.prompt: What's the classifier for a letter/email? 'một ___ thư'
questions.explanation: 'bức thư' = a letter. 'bức' for flat items with content (art, photos, letters)
'đôi đũa' = pair of chopsticks. 'đôi' for natural pairs

questions.prompt: How do you say 'one shoe' (just one, not a pair)?
questions.explanation: 'chiếc' = single item from a pair. 'đôi' = the pair. 'một chiếc giày' = one shoe

questions.prompt: What classifier would you use for 'áo' (shirt)?
questions.explanation: 'cái áo' = a shirt. Clothing items use 'cái'. A full outfit is 'bộ quần áo'

questions.prompt: Một ___ quần áo (a set of clothes)
questions.explanation: 'bộ' = a set/collection: bộ quần áo (outfit), bộ bàn ghế (furniture set)

questions.prompt: Which sentence correctly orders a book at a bookstore?
questions.correct: Cho tôi một cuốn sách này
options: Cho tôi một cuốn sách này
Cho tôi một cái sách này
Cho tôi một tờ sách này
Cho tôi một bức sách này
questions.explanation: 'cuốn' is specifically for books and bound items

questions.prompt: How do you say 'a bouquet of flowers'?
questions.explanation: 'bó' = a bundle/bunch. 'bông hoa' = a single flower. 'bó hoa' = bouquet
